channel.title: Kieran Potts
channel.description: A blog exploring the open web platform and software engineering.

item.title: Should we rebrand REST?
item.description: In this blogpost I argue the case for consigning the term "REST API" to history. In its place we should adopt the terms "HTTP API" and "hypermedia API", which better differentiate two distinctive designs for the programmatic interfaces of web services.

item.title: Should we rebrand JavaScript?
item.description: There are several problems with the JavaScript name. Is it time to rebrand JavaScript? If so, what should we call it?

item.title: Hello, world!
item.description: This blog will explore the history of software engineering, analyse the current state of the industry, and try to predict its future trajectory.
